entities.description: Region where aflatoxin contamination in peanuts is a major challenge

entities.description: The ability of peanut varieties to withstand A. flavus infection and aflatoxin accumulation

entities.description: Biotechnological approach to increase the expression of specific genes

entities.name: MTDEF4.2
entities.description: An antifungal plant defensin gene used to improve genetic resistance

entities.name: HOST-INDUCED GENE SILENCING
entities.description: A technique used to silence specific genes in a pathogen via the host plant

entities.name: AFLM

entities.name: AFLP
entities.description: A gene within the aflatoxin biosynthetic pathway targeted for silencing

entities.description: The series of biochemical reactions that lead to the production of aflatoxin

entities.description: The process by which Aspergillus flavus synthesizes aflatoxin

entities.name: TRANSCRIPTOMIC SIGNATURES
entities.description: Analysis of RNA transcripts to identify mechanisms of resistance

entities.name: REACTIVE OXYGEN SPECIES-SCAVENGING ENZYMES
entities.description: Enzymes that protect the plant by neutralizing reactive oxygen species

entities.name: FOOD SAFETY

entities.description: Environmental regions where aflatoxin contamination is prevalent
